description:
I need to rotate some API credentials in a configuration file. We have a config file at /home/user/app_config/services.conf that contains several API keys for different services. 

The current file has lines in this format:
```
SERVICE_NAME=api_key_value
```

I need you to do the following:

1. Find all lines in /home/user/app_config/services.conf that contain the pattern "API_KEY" in the variable name and extract just those lines to a backup file at /home/user/app_config/old_keys.backup

2. In the original /home/user/app_config/services.conf file, replace all API key values (the part after the = sign) for any line where the variable name contains "API_KEY" with the placeholder text "ROTATED_PENDING_UPDATE"

For example, if a line was:
```
PAYMENT_API_KEY=sk_live_abc123xyz
```

It should become:
```
PAYMENT_API_KEY=ROTATED_PENDING_UPDATE
```

Lines that don't contain "API_KEY" in the variable name should remain unchanged.

The backup file /home/user/app_config/old_keys.backup should contain the original lines exactly as they were, one per line, with no extra blank lines at the end.
truth:
Initial setup required before task:
- Create directory: /home/user/app_config/
- Create file: /home/user/app_config/services.conf with the following content:

```
# Application Configuration
DATABASE_HOST=localhost
DATABASE_PORT=5432
PAYMENT_API_KEY=sk_live_abc123xyz789
LOGGING_LEVEL=INFO
ANALYTICS_API_KEY=ak_prod_def456uvw
CACHE_TTL=3600
NOTIFICATION_API_KEY=nk_main_ghi789rst
SERVICE_ENDPOINT=https://api.example.com
```

Expected final state:

1. File /home/user/app_config/old_keys.backup should exist and contain exactly:
```
PAYMENT_API_KEY=sk_live_abc123xyz789
ANALYTICS_API_KEY=ak_prod_def456uvw
NOTIFICATION_API_KEY=nk_main_ghi789rst
```

2. File /home/user/app_config/services.conf should contain exactly:
```
# Application Configuration
DATABASE_HOST=localhost
DATABASE_PORT=5432
PAYMENT_API_KEY=ROTATED_PENDING_UPDATE
LOGGING_LEVEL=INFO
ANALYTICS_API_KEY=ROTATED_PENDING_UPDATE
CACHE_TTL=3600
NOTIFICATION_API_KEY=ROTATED_PENDING_UPDATE
SERVICE_ENDPOINT=https://api.example.com
```

Verification checks:
- /home/user/app_config/old_keys.backup exists
- /home/user/app_config/old_keys.backup contains exactly 3 lines
- /home/user/app_config/old_keys.backup contains "PAYMENT_API_KEY=sk_live_abc123xyz789"
- /home/user/app_config/old_keys.backup contains "ANALYTICS_API_KEY=ak_prod_def456uvw"
- /home/user/app_config/old_keys.backup contains "NOTIFICATION_API_KEY=nk_main_ghi789rst"
- /home/user/app_config/services.conf contains "PAYMENT_API_KEY=ROTATED_PENDING_UPDATE"
- /home/user/app_config/services.conf contains "ANALYTICS_API_KEY=ROTATED_PENDING_UPDATE"
- /home/user/app_config/services.conf contains "NOTIFICATION_API_KEY=ROTATED_PENDING_UPDATE"
- /home/user/app_config/services.conf contains "DATABASE_HOST=localhost" (unchanged)
- /home/user/app_config/services.conf contains "CACHE_TTL=3600" (unchanged)
- /home/user/app_config/services.conf does NOT contain "sk_live_abc123xyz789"
- /home/user/app_config/services.conf does NOT contain "ak_prod_def456uvw"
- /home/user/app_config/services.conf does NOT contain "nk_main_ghi789rst"
name: task_000000_db816a54
